Hey, what's going on, Jim Lawrence? So I'm gonna walk you through a quick example of what this auto-populate code does in Acuity and why it's beneficial for you to add into your funnel. So when someone clicks into your funnel, they're brought to this page. This is just the example funnel that I'm using just to show you what this add-on does. So when someone would come in, they'd click send me my voucher. Now you notice I have my information prefilled out here. A lot of people don't have that setting or they're on mobile where it probably doesn't even apply the same way it does on a computer. So nine times out of 10, this would be just new information. So I'd re-enter it. As you can see, I'm just putting tests for first and last name. And then I have a test email address. So I'm gonna submit this information as normal. And then here's where the magic happens. When somebody goes to your thank you page, you usually have your calendar hooked up right there. So it's gonna load up in a bit and that's the scheduler. Now when somebody goes to schedule an appointment, they're gonna find the appointment they like, they're gonna click it. They would have to re-enter their information into here. But this, as you can see, it automatically just transferred over from the first page where I submitted it. So that's the hack. That's how it's gonna help you out. And it'll just increase the appointments that are scheduled and therefore increase your total leads and the likelihood that they'll show up. So let's get started on how to do this. First thing you wanna do is you wanna come back to this page in the portal. Now this is an updated video. So this is not the same video that you're gonna see. You're gonna be seeing this video at the time, but you should see a button just like this. So what I want you to do is I want you to just right click that open link in a new tab. And we'll save that for now. After that, I need you to go ahead and log into ClickFunnels, log into your acuity page. And then once you've done that, go ahead and come back to this video. So pause that, do that real quick and then come back. And once you're back, let's go ahead and continue. What we wanna do is we want to go to our ClickFunnels page first and then we're gonna go to the funnels. And then from there, we will find our funnel that we're sending people to through our ads currently. So once you've got that funnel located for me, it's just gonna be the one that I most recently edited. Once it loads up. So this is the one that I'm gonna be editing right here. And then I'm gonna click this page real quick just to let it finish loading because it looks like it's slowing everything down. So this is the code that you're gonna be using. Again, to get that, all you gotta do is click this button right here and it'll take you straight to it. And then once you're at your squeeze page, what you want to do is go ahead and click Edit Page. And from Edit Page, we're just gonna copy some code over from here into here, but we'll wait for it to load. Sweet. So obviously you would update your funnel, the background, all this stuff. Like you wouldn't want that here. Once you've done that, this is when you'll want to move on to this. So from here, we're gonna go into Tracking Code. And then you want to make sure that you're in the footer code. You want to scroll all the way down to the last line. So it looks like all the way down is 95. I'm just gonna scroll down to 98. And then we're gonna grab this page. So all you want to do is copy this, just like that. Highlight it, copy. See how it says Optin Page Code and we're on the Optin Page. And then you want to come over here, click Paste. And then from there, you can click X, but you have to remember to save it right here. So that saved it. And then we're done with the first part. Pretty smooth so far. So then we're gonna exit and then we're gonna go on to the Thank You page. So you're basically installing one piece on the first page that says like which information to grab. And then the second page gets their own piece of code that says input this information here. So once you have the Thank You page loaded up, you're gonna click Edit Page. And then usually when you're screen sharing, it takes a little bit longer to load. So excuse the super long load times on this. But from there, while we're waiting for that to load, let's go ahead and copy this because this is what we're gonna need to paste in there. So we'll copy that. And as you noticed, these parts are highlighted. They're highlighted because that's where we're gonna have to change. So for right now, we're just gonna copy them and we're gonna come over to the custom JavaScript, click Open Code Editor, whatever you have in there, you're just gonna delete it. No matter what it is, just delete it. That's usually where your acuity calendar goes. So if you have it embedded already, that's probably what's in there. Clear it out and then paste that new code. Now, you see right here where it says first part of acuity embed code. Let's go grab that first part that we need. That's gonna be an acuity. So once you're logged in, you should be at this homepage. Where you wanna go from the homepage is, well, depending on whatever page you're on, you wanna come to Scheduling Page Link. So if you're already logged in, you could just find that right on the left side. So from Scheduling Page Link, you want to go to whichever appointment type you want to get scheduled. So in this case, I'm just gonna do the test appointments and then you wanna come to Embed Scheduler. And then you see this first line right here, iframe source, right where that quotation mark is. So you don't wanna highlight the quotation mark, but you wanna highlight what's inside it. So it's all of this and it goes down to just about here. So that's what you wanna highlight it. If you can't see this, make the video larger so you can see exactly where it's at, so you can duplicate the same thing on your screen. You just wanna copy that and then we're gonna come back into your funnel. And then again, what's inside of the quotation marks, just highlight that and you wanna erase it. So just like that, you don't wanna copy this. You wanna erase it, make sure everything's cleared and all you have is the quotation marks. Then you're gonna right click here, paste, make sure it's in between the quotes and then hashtag from code from ClickFunnels. So same thing right here, except we grabbed this from ClickFunnels. So what we're gonna do is we're gonna exit this real quick, come right back to it, same thing. And then instead of clicking open code editor, we're gonna click get CSS info.
